description: Credential commands — create, accept, delete, and list XRPL on-chain credentials with string and hex encoding support

userStories.title: credential create command
userStories.description: As a credential issuer, I want to create an on-chain credential for a subject account so I can attest to their identity or permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Read CredentialCreate docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/credentialcreate.md before implementing
Create src/commands/credential.ts and register it in src/commands/index.ts and src/index.ts

xrpl credential create with: --subject address (required), --credential-type string (plain string auto hex-encoded via convertStringToHex, max 64 bytes after encoding), --credential-type-hex hex (raw hex used as-is, 2-128 hex chars), --uri string (optional, plain string hex-encoded, max 256 bytes), --uri-hex hex (optional, raw hex, max 512 hex chars), --expiration ISO8601 (optional, XRPL epoch conversion)
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
CLI exits with error if both --credential-type and --credential-type-hex are provided
CLI exits with error if neither --credential-type nor --credential-type-hex is provided
CLI exits with error if both --uri and --uri-hex are provided
On success, output prints the Credential ledger entry ID from AffectedNodes CreatedNode where LedgerEntryType === 'Credential'
tests/e2e/credential/credential.validation.test.ts: missing subject, missing credential-type, both credential-type flags, both uri flags, missing key material (no network)
tests/e2e/credential/credential.create.test.ts: create with --credential-type, create with --credential-type-hex, create with --uri, create with --expiration, --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: credential accept command
userStories.description: As a credential subject, I want to accept a credential issued to me so it becomes active on-chain.
acceptanceCriteria: Read CredentialAccept docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/credentialaccept.md before implementing
xrpl credential accept with: --issuer address (required), --credential-type string (plain string auto hex-encoded), --credential-type-hex hex (raw hex)
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
CLI exits with error if both --credential-type and --credential-type-hex are provided
CLI exits with error if neither is provided
tests/e2e/credential/credential.accept.test.ts: issuer creates credential, subject accepts it, verify accepted status via credential list; --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: credential delete command
userStories.description: As an issuer or subject, I want to delete a credential from the ledger to revoke it or clean up expired entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Read CredentialDelete docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/credentialdelete.md before implementing

xrpl credential delete with: --credential-type string (plain string hex-encoded), --credential-type-hex hex (raw hex), --subject address (optional, defaults to sender), --issuer address (optional, defaults to sender)
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
CLI exits with error if both --credential-type and --credential-type-hex are provided
CLI exits with error if neither is provided
tests/e2e/credential/credential.delete.test.ts: issuer deletes own credential, subject deletes own accepted credential, --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: credential list query command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to list credentials for an account so I can see what has been issued, accepted, or is pending.
acceptanceCriteria: xrpl credential list <address> subcommand using account_objects RPC with type: 'credential'

Default human-readable output per credential: credential ID, issuer, subject, credential type (decoded from hex to UTF-8 string if valid, otherwise raw hex), URI (decoded if valid UTF-8, else hex, or 'none'), expiration (ISO8601 or 'none'), accepted (yes/no based on lsfAccepted flag)
XRPL epoch timestamps converted to ISO8601: new Date((epoch + 946684800) * 1000).toISOString()
--json outputs raw JSON array
--node supported
tests/e2e/credential/credential.list.test.ts: create and accept credential, verify accepted=yes in list; create without accepting, verify accepted=no; --json output
Typecheck passes
